title: hierarchical verilation of all modules declared in file

features.name: uninstantiated module with verilator hier_block attribute
features.description: Code should include a module with /*verilator hier_block*/ attribute that is not instantiated in the design being verilated

features.name: multiple hier_block modules in single file
features.description: Code should include multiple modules marked with /*verilator hier_block*/ attribute in a single source file
